consent.headline: Get Financing for Your Restaurant
consent.subheadline: Access capital based on your daily sales — no credit checks, no collateral

benefits.noCreditCheckDesc: We evaluate your sales performance, not your personal credit score
benefits.autoRepaymentDesc: A small percentage of daily sales is held back — you pay as you earn
benefits.fastAccessDesc: Funds deposited within 1-2 business days after acceptance

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.step1: Grant consent to analyze your sales data
howItWorks.step2: We calculate your financial profile automatically
howItWorks.step3: If eligible, receive a tailored financing offer
howItWorks.step4: Accept the offer and receive funds

dataConsent.title: Data Consent
dataConsent.description: We analyze your order volume, revenue, payment methods, and refund rates to determine eligibility. Your data is never shared with third parties.
dataConsent.checkbox: I consent to the analysis of my sales data for financing purposes

terms.loadError: Could not load terms. Please try again.

consent.trust: Your data is encrypted and processed securely. You can revoke consent at any time.

profile.title: Financial Profile
profile.calculating: Your financial profile is being calculated. This may take a few minutes.
profile.revokeConfirm: Are you sure? This will remove your financial profile and any active offers.

offer.title: Financing Offer
offer.confirmMessage: By accepting, you agree to repay {{total}} through a {{percent}}% daily holdback on your sales. This is a signal of intent — no payment is collected now.
offer.acceptedMessage: Our team will be in touch within 1-2 business days to finalize the details.

preEligible.title: Almost There
preEligible.subtitle: You're building your financial profile. Keep going!

tips.title: Tips to Qualify Faster
tips.tip1: Accept more card payments to increase your card payment ratio

ineligible.title: Not Yet Eligible
ineligible.subtitle: Your profile doesn't currently meet the requirements, but you can improve it.

upgrade.message: Revenue-based financing is available on the Pro plan. Upgrade to access capital for your restaurant.

privacy.title: Data & Privacy
privacy.revokeEffect3: You can re-enable this at any time
privacy.revokeRetention: Historical data is retained for regulatory compliance.

registration.consentDescription: Let us analyze your sales data to determine eligibility for funding.
registration.consentCheckbox: I agree to data analysis for financing eligibility
